creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your report. 
I note the missing JAVA option is for opencv port version 3.4.1, which suggests an out of date ports tree.

Could you please:

- Update your ports tree to the latest versions and confirm reproduction of the issue. If the issue remains reproducible:

Include additional information:

- Full `uname -a` output
- `pkg info opencv` output (as an attachment)
- `pkg version -v` output (as an attachment)
